calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2022 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-01-2022 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-24-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2022 Set For Trial On Dec-05-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2022 Continued To Apr-06-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-26-2022 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Mark Kobata, Esq. (310.277.7556; mkobata@bkd-law.com) of Barlow & Kobata for Defendant.
No other appearances.

A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS TOWNSHIP BUILDING SERVICES, INC., JORGE RODAS and NOE FRANCO'S DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is overruled in its entirety. The FAC extensively pleads grounds for tolling and states that expert testimony will be adduced. (Id. at 5:6-7:3.) This suffices at the pleading stage. (See Hopkins v. Kedzierski (2014) 225 Cal.App.4th 736, 745 ("equitable tolling presents a question of fact").) Moreover, assault claims are not precluded by workers' compensation. (Meyer v. Graphic Arts International Union (1979) 88 Cal.App.3d 176.)

Defendants' responsive pleading shall be filed on or before Feb. 25, 2022.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
